parameter_changes.name: revisit_penalty
parameter_changes.reason: Previous round showed no observable change versus the prior successful run. Increase revisit_penalty more decisively while keeping turn_penalty fixed, so the effect is interpretable.

questions: Compared with the previous successful run, did the larger revisit_penalty create a measurable behavioral delta?
Did coverage saturation improve without causing a clear collapse in terminal reward?
Do late-stage curves still show diminishing returns or a new useful regime?
Should the next round keep revisit_penalty in this direction, revert it, or instead adjust turn_penalty?
codex_analysis_focus.expected_output_style: Write a structured markdown report for GPT using the codex_report.md sections.

controller_notes: Real round derived from round_0011. Run a one-variable experiment only; keep non-target parameters fixed for interpretability.
